testcase.name: test_generate_artifact_structure

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: generate failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_arquitecto.py:95: in generated_artifact assert r.status_code == 200, f"generate failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: generate failed: 502 The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
